name: Confluent, Inc.
description: Confluent, Inc. provides a data streaming platform that enables organizations to connect and process their data in real-time. Founded by the creators of Apache Kafka, the company offers Confluent Cloud, a fully managed cloud-native service, and Confluent Platform, an enterprise-grade self-managed software. Its platform allows businesses to build real-time applications, integrate disparate data sources, and analyze streaming data continuously to drive immediate business value and operational efficiency.
